metadata.claim_text: AC separations are graded shoulder girdle injuries where displacement and patient demand guide operative versus nonoperative care.
AC Joint Separation pathoanatomy centers on ac-joint, clavicle and related stabilizers.
Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating ac joint separation.
Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for ac joint separation — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.
State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for ac joint separation.
Rehabilitation milestones and return-to-play criteria for ac joint separation require attending-defined progression gates.
Rockwood classification communicates AC joint displacement and CC ligament injury severity.
